final:
module matrix_mult (
    input [3:0] obf_A00, A01, A10, A11, // Matrix A
    input [3:0] B00, B01, B10, B11, // Matrix B
    output [3:0] C00, C01, C10, C11 // Matrix C (Result)
);
    assign C00 = obf_A00 * B00 + A01 * B10; // C[0][0]
    assign C01 = obf_A00 * B01 + A01 * B11; // C[0][1]
    assign C10 = A10 * B00 + A11 * B10; // C[1][0]
    assign C11 = A10 * B01 + A11 * B11; // C[1][1]
endmodule
